scope: deep dive on the top 6 portfolio chips as ranked by the live 2026-03-21 portfolio-v3 run

chips.name: domain-chip-startup-yc
strengths: Best operating depth in the portfolio with 785 runs and the deepest watchtower.
Strong integration maturity and real empirical volume.
risks: Doctrine quality is only moderate despite the scale.
Contradiction resolution is still weak relative to run volume.

chips.name: domain-chip-xcontent
strengths: Strong evidence integrity and fast positive trajectory.
Doctrine quality is already better than most of the portfolio.
risks: No realworld_validated lane yet and contradiction rigor is still moderate.

chips.name: domain-chip-pokemon-red
strengths: Massive operating history and excellent watchtower substance.
Very strong empirical velocity and artifact production.
risks: Evidence integrity is only moderate because lane balance is skewed.
Contradiction rigor is too light for the amount of history.

chips.name: domain-chip-content
strengths: Best doctrine quality in the top tier.
Strong contradiction rigor relative to its run count.
risks: Run count is still low at 10.
No realworld_validated evidence and weak watchtower substance.

chips.name: domain-chip-agentic-marketing
strengths: Healthy watchtower depth and real artifact volume.
Good contradiction coverage and mature structure.
risks: Doctrine quality is only moderate and causal density is still zero.

chips.name: domain-chip-spark-private
strengths: Very strong watchtower depth and solid operating surface breadth.
Strong v2 hardening and decent contradiction coverage.
risks: Only 8 recorded runs, so empirical claims are still thin.
No realworld_validated lane and doctrine quality remains moderate.

portfolio_read.shared_pattern: All six top chips are already production_ready on v2 but still only beta on v3.
portfolio_read.meaning: The leadership tier is structurally hardened. The remaining gap is not basic chip correctness; it is deeper operating truth, doctrine quality, evidence balance, contradiction resolution, and sustained flywheel history.

recommendations: Treat startup-yc as the flagship reference chip.
Treat xcontent as a probationary leader until the anti-gaming flag clears.
Use content as the doctrine-quality model and startup-yc as the operating-depth model.
Push pokemon-red to improve contradiction rigor instead of simply adding more runs.
Force agentic-marketing and spark-private to prove positive trajectory before expanding their strategic weight.
